title: World Corruptor
description: This is a fun experimental mod which I made because I got bored. WARNING! THIS MOD WILL CORRUPT YOUR WORLD, SO USE WITH CAUTION. IT IS A FUN CHALLENGE MOD.
body:
This is a fun experimental mod which I made because I got bored. 

This mod is a fun challenge which will corrupt your world slowly over time, by swapping blocks around, and doing many other chaotic things. Can you survive a world that is falling apart?

Commands: CorruptedStormOn (1 - 35)

WARNING! THIS MOD WILL CORRUPT YOUR WORLD, SO USE WITH CAUTION, AND DONT USE IT ON A WORLD YOU HAVE A LOT OF BUILDS IN (Unless you want to). IT IS A FUN CHALLENGE MOD.

Video preview:

[https://youtu.be/CuM8NrS7jOw](https://youtu.be/CuM8NrS7jOw)
